title: Discount Calculator - Calculate Sale Price
description: Free discount calculator. Calculate the sale price after discount, savings amount, and final price with tax.
keywords: discount calculator, sale price calculator, percent off calculator, savings calculator
intro: Calculate how much you save with a discount. Enter the original price and discount percentage.

faq.a: Sale Price = Original Price × (1 - Discount%/100). For 30% off $100: $100 × 0.70 = $70.

faq.q: How to calculate original price from sale price?
faq.a: Original Price = Sale Price / (1 - Discount%/100). If sale price is $70 at 30% off: $70 / 0.70 = $100.
